summary: Gradle test execution reported multiple failing tests (50 errors). Several distinct test classes failed across executors, indicating runtime test assertion or environment/setup failures rather than a compilation error.
root_cause: Multiple JUnit/Gradle tests failed during test execution (50 errors across test executors), e.g. failures in SchemaDatabaseFileGenerationFailureTest and SchemaUpdateTaskSettersTest, indicating runtime test failures/assertion errors.
relevant_tests: Gradle Test Executor 29 > ValidationTest > testError1() PASSED

evidence.reason: Shows there were 50 test errors reported in the CI run.
Example of a specific test class reported as failing during Gradle test execution.
Another failing test class reported, indicating multiple distinct test failures.

evidence.quote: Gradle Test Executor 29 > ValidationTest > testError1() PASSED
evidence.reason: Shows these are Gradle/JUnit test results (some tests may pass while others fail), supporting a test-run failure context.
Paths in the log point to source/test files under the repository, confirming failures originate from project tests.

suggested_fix: Open the Gradle test reports (build/test-results) from the failing CI run to see specific assertion failures, then run the failing tests locally with Gradle (e.g., ./gradlew :module:test --tests "*SchemaDatabaseFileGenerationFailureTest*") to reproduce and fix the assertions or test setup/environment issues.
